description: A perfect option to go with your fashionable outfits, this brown handbag from yelloe comes with a glossy upper and a spacious inner to hold your party essentials.Dimensions : 22 cm x 32 cmMade of leatherette for durabilityHas a zipped closure and a metal runner on the zip for styleOne zipped inner pocketQuilted design on the outside Metal and leatherette chain for carrying easeBranding appliquéd on the frontCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
